title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 184.122 - Museum law to supersede lost and unclaimed property law
text:
184.122.  Museum law to supersede lost and unclaimed property law. — The provisions of sections 184.101 to 184.122, to the extent applicable, shall supersede the provisions of the lost and unclaimed property act, sections 447.010 to 447.595.
(L. 1991 S.B. 344 § 13)
